dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system demonstrated flawless adherence to governance structures, with 100% schema validation success across all four reasoning spans. The 'rules-context-loader' successfully initiated the governance loop, which was consistently maintained through the alignment engine.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Exceptional causal depth is evidenced by the 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span, which processed 57,492 tokens—a significant increase over the baseline. This indicates an extremely granular mapping of architectural evolution and intent.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Strong performance in tension resolution within the 'alignment-engine', processing 30,837 tokens. While slightly more concise than the baseline, the successful schema validation confirms that architectural trade-offs were resolved within the required parameters.
